text:
Tokharone (トクハロネ, Tokuharone) is a player of the game Greed Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 152 

Appearance

Tokharone sports an undercut, has thick eyebrows, a bulbous nose, and a chiseled face. 

Background

Alongside Feitan, Phinks, the Bellam Brothers (Gashta & Zetsk), team Hagakushi, and Tsezguerra's team, his team is one of the teams that the Bombers pay attention to. He and Hagakushi are briefly mentioned by Bara as someone who the Bombers need to wait them to revert their Risky Dice. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 16, Chapter 153 

Plot

Greed Island arc

The Bombers mention Tokharone as a player that should be watched over. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Being on the Bombers' watch list, can be speculated he's not only a skilled Greed Island player, but also a skilled Nen user as well. 

Due to being able to access Greed Island, he is confirmed to be able to utilize Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 13, Chapter 121 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Manga and Anime Differences

Tokharone is not mentioned in either anime adaptation.
